name: music-assistant-models
documentation:
# Music Assistant Base Models

Models used by Music Assistant (shared by client and server)

classes.name: music_assistant_models.errors.InvalidProviderID

classes.name: music_assistant_models.errors.RetriesExhausted
documentation: Error thrown when a retries to a given provider URI have been exhausted.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.errors.ResourceTemporarilyUnavailable
documentation: Error thrown when a resource is temporarily unavailable.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.errors.ProviderPermissionDenied
documentation: Error thrown when a provider action is denied because of permissions.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.errors.ActionUnavailable
documentation: Error thrown when a action is denied because is is (temporary) unavailable/not possible.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.enums.QueueOption
documentation:
Enum representation of the queue (play) options.

- PLAY -> Insert new item(s) in queue at the current position and start playing.
- REPLACE -> Replace entire queue contents with the new items and start playing from index 0.
- NEXT -> Insert item(s) after current playing/buffered item.
- REPLACE_NEXT -> Replace item(s) after current playing/buffered item.
- ADD -> Add new item(s) to the queue (at the end if shuffle is not enabled).

classes.name: music_assistant_models.enums.PlayerState
documentation: Enum for the (playback)state of a player.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.enums.PlayerType

methods.name: music_assistant_models.enums.PlayerType._missing_
documentation: Set default enum member if an unknown value is provided.

Enum with possible Player Types.

player: A regular player.
stereo_pair: Same as player but a dedicated stereo pair of 2 speakers.
group: A (dedicated) (sync)group player or (universal) playergroup.

classes.name: music_assistant_models.enums.PlayerFeature

methods.name: music_assistant_models.enums.PlayerFeature._missing_
documentation: Set default enum member if an unknown value is provided.

Enum with possible Player features.

power: The player has a dedicated power control.
volume: The player supports adjusting the volume.
mute: The player supports muting the volume.
sync: The player supports syncing with other players (of the same platform).
accurate_time: The player provides millisecond accurate timing information.
seek: The player supports seeking to a specific.
enqueue: The player supports (en)queuing of media items natively.

methods.name: music_assistant_models.enums.EventType._missing_
documentation: Set default enum member if an unknown value is provided.
